title: 20L/Day Dehumidifiers for Home Powerful Dehumidifier with Laundry Mode, Digital Humidity Display, 24H Timer, 2.6L Water Tank & Continuous Drainage, Quiet for Bedroom/Basement/Office, Energy Saving
features: 【Powerful Dehumidification, 20L/Day High Efficiency】Equipped with a high-quality compressor, the efficient dehumidification technology extract 20 liters of moisture in 24 hours under 30°C/80% RH conditions, quickly reducing space humidity from 80% to a comfortable45%. Whether it's a 40-60㎡（430-645 Sq. Ft) large bedroom, a damp basement, or a closed cloakroom, it effectively tackles moisture issues, fundamentally solving mold growth and damp clothes problems, and superior quality with low energy cost.

【Smart Humidity Control System, Precise and Energy-saving】Our dehumidifier is fitted with a high-precision humidity sensor, boasting an error margin of just ±3%, and allows for manual setting of target humidity levels (30-80%). The device automatically starts and stops to maintain the set humidity, delivering greater energy efficiency than standard models. Additionally, it comes equipped with a 24-hour timer, enabling you to preset on/off times based on your usage habits—this avoids unnecessary operation and further enhances energy savings.

【Intuitive Smart Panel & Real-time Humidity Display】Dehumidifiers featuring a large circular digital screen that delivers crisp, easy-to-read readings—no need to walk right up to the unit, making it effortless to check humidity levels. Complementing the digital display are three clear indicator lights, each corresponding to specific humidity ranges: blue (humidity＜45%), green (45%~65%), and red (humidity＞65%).This blend of clear visual cues and customisability ensures the dehumidifier adapts seamlessly to homes.

【User-friendly Design for Convenience】Our dehumidifier (perfect for dehumidifiers for home use) features a 2.6L transparent water tank has clear water level scales, automatically stopping and alarming when full to avoid overflow. It comes with a 3.3ft drain pipe as standard, supporting direct connection to the floor drain for continuous drainage without frequent water pouring. The bottom is equipped with magnetic universal wheels, sliding smoothly without derailing, making it easy to move between different rooms, also includes an embedded handle for convenient carrying, enhancing the practicality of this home-focused dehumidifier.

【3 Modes & 2 Speeds to Tilored Humidity Solutions for Homes】The home dehumidifier integrates three smart modes (Smart Humidity Mode for effortless daily control—maintain 30-80% target humidity, energy-efficient use in bedrooms/living rooms; Smart Laundry Mode for cost-effective drying—ensuring clothes remain dry and pristine. Sleep Mode for bedroom—provide low noise and low wind speed dehumidification without disturbing your sleep quality; In addition, there are 2 different wind speeds, low and high, to meet your different needs.

【Quiet Technology, Enjoy Undisturbed Life】Adopting advanced shock absorption technology and vortex air duct design, the operating noise is as low as 38dB, reaching library-level quiet standards. The night sleep mode automatically turns off the LED display to avoid light interference. In addition, the dehumidifier has a built-in compressor with defrosting, memory, and protection functions. When the room temperature is below 45 ° F, the automatic defrosting function is activated to ensure efficient operation even under low temperature conditions.
